race.comment: STRANGLEHOLD (10) loves this distance range with two wins and a placing from four attempts and will be high on confidence following that last-start Gold Coast victory. Jockey Dempsey stays on top and maps perfectly for this from gate three. Can go back-to-back. OUT OF TURN (9) saves his best form for his home circuit here and gets some weight relief from the favourable draw. Plenty to like about his prospects. HOLY FLASH (6) strips fitter third-up from the break and is more than capable enough on his day. In the mix. IKASARA (2) has been thereabouts without winning, last start finishing second over 1350m at Ipswich. Include.
